claims.text: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming.
claims.source_quote: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming.

claims.text: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models

claims.text: Existing approaches' results suffer from the Janus problem.
claims.source_quote: but their results suffer from the Janus problem

claims.text: Existing approaches do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.
claims.source_quote: do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data

claims.text: Hoi3DGen generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely.
claims.source_quote: We introduce Hoi3DGen, a framework that generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely.

claims.text: The authors curate realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models.
claims.source_quote: We first curate realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models

claims.text: The authors create a full text-to-3D pipeline.
claims.source_quote: and then create a full text-to-3D pipeline

claims.text: The method achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity.
claims.source_quote: which achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity

claims.text: The method surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency.
claims.source_quote: Our method surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency

claims.text: The method surpasses baselines by 3-7x in 3D model quality.
The method exhibits strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types.
claims.source_quote: exhibiting strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types
